form.formComment: Last start eased back early on 8th of 11 at Cranbourne Bm62 on March 27 over 2025m, on a slow track; 8 len behind So Suave with 59.5kg at $20. Before that won by 1.3 len at Yarra Valley Bm62 March 15 over 1950m defeating Track Patcher carrying 57.5kg at $26. The win two back looks a good reference for a race of this nature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Last start eased back early on 8th of 11 at Cranbourne Bm62 on March 27 over 2025m, on a slow track; 8 len behind So Suave with 59.5kg at $20. form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up got back early 6th of 10 at Kyneton Bm56 on March 13 over 1862m, 5 len behind Broadhurst with 62kg at $11. Second-up came from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Cranbourne Bm62 on March 27 over 2025m, slow going 5.5 len behind So Suave carrying 59kg at $13. Beaten 5-1/4 lengths last start but that was 62 grade, so this much more suitable third-up.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 6th of 11 at Mt Gambier Cl1-Sw on March 22 over 2050m, 9 len behind Zuleika with 59kg at $14. Last start was the first run for the year, so should come on from that.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation 3rd of 8 at Kyneton Bm56 on November 18 over 2845m, 6 len behind Jenni The Tank with 71kg at $7.50. When resuming last campaign 2nd of 9 at Mornington Bm58 on November 5 2023 over 2400m, 3 len behind Dictionary carrying 61kg at $9. Finished sixth in a Bendigo jump-out on April 1. In new hands, but this looks an ask first-up.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 11 at Echuca Bm56 on March 21 over 2124m, 1.3 len behind Flash Of Dallas carrying 59kg at $6.50. Before that 4th of 9 at Yarra Valley Bm62 on March 15 over 1950m, 2.75 len behind Xtrarevz with 56kg at $7. Racing consistently and looks a major player again.
